notes: Changed What you spend into an editable common-expense checklist so users can work down familiar categories, add amounts where relevant, rename items, or add a missing expense.
Replaced the jargony sinking funds wording with planned irregular costs in the user-facing Spending Plan beta UI.
Removed the account-creation form from Spending Plan beta; the flow now assumes five account roles and explains what goes where.
Clarified the priority order: pay debt first, rebuild the emergency account next, then divert remaining money to savings or longer-term goals.
Replaced remaining bare Streamlit success/warning conditional expressions to reduce the chance of raw DeltaGenerator output appearing in user-facing pages.
release_notes: Makes Spending Plan beta more intuitive by replacing the account-creation form with a five-account flow map, renaming sinking funds to planned irregular costs, and turning What you spend into an editable common-expense checklist.
